needs_localization.content: - Create an application → Bot → Add Bot
needs_localization.context: - Create an application → Bot → Add Bot

needs_localization.content: - In the Bot settings, enable **MESSAGE CONTENT INTENT**
needs_localization.context: - In the Bot settings, enable **MESSAGE CONTENT INTENT**

needs_localization.content: - (Optional) Enable **SERVER MEMBERS INTENT** if you plan to use allow lists based on member data
needs_localization.context: - (Optional) Enable **SERVER MEMBERS INTENT** if you plan to use allow lists based on member data

needs_localization.content: - Open the generated invite URL and add the bot to your server
needs_localization.context: - Open the generated invite URL and add the bot to your server

needs_localization.content: - Create or reuse a Matrix account on your homeserver (for example `matrix.org`).
needs_localization.context: - Create or reuse a Matrix account on your homeserver (for example `matrix.org`).

needs_localization.content: - Confirm you can log in with Element.
needs_localization.context: - Confirm you can log in with Element.

needs_localization.content: - `deviceId` (recommended so sync tokens can be restored across restarts)
needs_localization.context: - `deviceId` (recommended so sync tokens can be restored across restarts)

needs_localization.content: - You can obtain these from your homeserver login API (`/_matrix/client/v3/login`) or from your client's advanced session settings.
needs_localization.context: - You can obtain these from your homeserver login API (`/_matrix/client/v3/login`) or from your client's advanced session settings.

needs_localization.content: Scan QR with WhatsApp → Settings → Linked Devices
needs_localization.context: # Scan QR with WhatsApp → Settings → Linked Devices

needs_localization.content: - Create a new app → Enable **Bot** capability
needs_localization.context: - Create a new app → Enable **Bot** capability

needs_localization.content: - Select **Long Connection** mode (requires running nanobot first to establish connection)
needs_localization.context: - Select **Long Connection** mode (requires running nanobot first to establish connection)

needs_localization.content: - Get **App ID** and **App Secret** from "Credentials & Basic Info"
needs_localization.context: - Get **App ID** and **App Secret** from "Credentials & Basic Info"

needs_localization.content: - Visit [QQ Open Platform](https://q.qq.com) → Register as a developer (personal or enterprise)
needs_localization.context: - Visit [QQ Open Platform](https://q.qq.com) → Register as a developer (personal or enterprise)

needs_localization.content: - Create a new app -> Add **Robot** capability
needs_localization.context: - Create a new app -> Add **Robot** capability

needs_localization.content: - **Permissions**: Add necessary permissions for sending messages
needs_localization.context: - **Permissions**: Add necessary permissions for sending messages

needs_localization.content: - Go to [Slack API](https://api.slack.com/apps) → **Create New App** → "From scratch"
needs_localization.context: - Go to [Slack API](https://api.slack.com/apps) → **Create New App** → "From scratch"

needs_localization.content: - Pick a name and select your workspace
needs_localization.context: - Pick a name and select your workspace

needs_localization.content: - **Socket Mode**: Toggle ON → Generate an **App-Level Token** with `connections:write` scope → copy it (`xapp-...`)
needs_localization.context: - **Socket Mode**: Toggle ON → Generate an **App-Level Token** with `connections:write` scope → copy it (`xapp-...`)

needs_localization.content: - **Event Subscriptions**: Toggle ON → Subscribe to bot events: `message.im`, `message.channels`, `app_mention` → Save Changes
needs_localization.context: - **Event Subscriptions**: Toggle ON → Subscribe to bot events: `message.im`, `message.channels`, `app_mention` → Save Changes

needs_localization.content: - **App Home**: Scroll to **Show Tabs** → Enable **Messages Tab** → Check **"Allow users to send Slash commands and messages from the messages tab"**
needs_localization.context: - **App Home**: Scroll to **Show Tabs** → Enable **Messages Tab** → Check **"Allow users to send Slash commands and messages from the messages tab"**

needs_localization.content: - **Install App**: Click **Install to Workspace** → Authorize → copy the **Bot Token** (`xoxb-...`)
needs_localization.context: - **Install App**: Click **Install to Workspace** → Authorize → copy the **Bot Token** (`xoxb-...`)

needs_localization.content: - Create a dedicated Gmail account for your bot (e.g. `my-nanobot@gmail.com`)
needs_localization.context: - Create a dedicated Gmail account for your bot (e.g. `my-nanobot@gmail.com`)

needs_localization.content: - Use this app password for both IMAP and SMTP
needs_localization.context: - Use this app password for both IMAP and SMTP

needs_localization.content: - [ ] Check weather forecast and send a summary
needs_localization.context: - [ ] Check weather forecast and send a summary

needs_localization.content: Edit config on host to add API keys

needs_localization.content: Run gateway (connects to enabled channels, e.g. Telegram/Discord/Mochat)

needs_localization.content: 1. **DO NOT** open a public GitHub issue

needs_localization.content: 2. Create a private security advisory on GitHub or contact the repository maintainers (xubinrencs@gmail.com)
needs_localization.context: 2. Create a private security advisory on GitHub or contact the repository maintainers (xubinrencs@gmail.com)

needs_localization.content: ✅ Good: Store in config file with restricted permissions
needs_localization.context: # ✅ Good: Store in config file with restricted permissions

needs_localization.content: ❌ Bad: Hardcoding keys in code or committing them
needs_localization.context: # ❌ Bad: Hardcoding keys in code or committing them

needs_localization.content: - Store API keys in `~/.nanobot/config.json` with file permissions set to `0600`
needs_localization.context: - Store API keys in `~/.nanobot/config.json` with file permissions set to `0600`

needs_localization.content: - Consider using environment variables for sensitive keys
needs_localization.context: - Consider using environment variables for sensitive keys

needs_localization.content: - Use OS keyring/credential manager for production deployments
needs_localization.context: - Use OS keyring/credential manager for production deployments

needs_localization.content: - Use separate API keys for development and production
needs_localization.context: - Use separate API keys for development and production

needs_localization.content: - In `v0.1.4.post3` and earlier, an empty `allowFrom` allows all users. In newer versions (including source builds), **empty `allowFrom` denies all access** — set `["*"]` to explicitly allow everyone.
needs_localization.context: - In `v0.1.4.post3` and earlier, an empty `allowFrom` allows all users. In newer versions (including source builds), **empty `allowFrom` denies all access** — set `["*"]` to explicitly allow everyone.

needs_localization.context: - Get your Telegram user ID from `@userinfobot`

needs_localization.content: - Use full phone numbers with country code for WhatsApp
needs_localization.context: - Use full phone numbers with country code for WhatsApp

needs_localization.content: - Review access logs regularly for unauthorized access attempts
needs_localization.context: - Review access logs regularly for unauthorized access attempts

needs_localization.content: - ✅ Review all tool usage in agent logs
needs_localization.context: - ✅ Review all tool usage in agent logs

needs_localization.content: - ✅ Understand what commands the agent is running
needs_localization.context: - ✅ Understand what commands the agent is running

needs_localization.content: - ✅ Use a dedicated user account with limited privileges
needs_localization.context: - ✅ Use a dedicated user account with limited privileges

needs_localization.content: - ❌ Don't run on systems with sensitive data without careful review
needs_localization.context: - ❌ Don't run on systems with sensitive data without careful review

needs_localization.content: - ✅ Run nanobot with a dedicated user account
needs_localization.context: - ✅ Run nanobot with a dedicated user account

needs_localization.content: - ✅ Use filesystem permissions to protect sensitive directories
needs_localization.context: - ✅ Use filesystem permissions to protect sensitive directories

needs_localization.content: - ✅ Regularly audit file operations in logs
needs_localization.context: - ✅ Regularly audit file operations in logs

needs_localization.content: - ❌ Don't give unrestricted access to sensitive files
needs_localization.context: - ❌ Don't give unrestricted access to sensitive files

needs_localization.content: - All external API calls use HTTPS by default
needs_localization.context: - All external API calls use HTTPS by default

needs_localization.content: - Timeouts are configured to prevent hanging requests
needs_localization.context: - Timeouts are configured to prevent hanging requests

needs_localization.content: - Consider using a firewall to restrict outbound connections if needed
needs_localization.context: - Consider using a firewall to restrict outbound connections if needed

needs_localization.content: - The bridge binds to `127.0.0.1:3001` (localhost only, not accessible from external network)
needs_localization.context: - The bridge binds to `127.0.0.1:3001` (localhost only, not accessible from external network)

needs_localization.content: - Set `bridgeToken` in config to enable shared-secret authentication between Python and Node.js
needs_localization.context: - Set `bridgeToken` in config to enable shared-secret authentication between Python and Node.js

needs_localization.content: - Keep `litellm` updated to the latest version for security fixes
needs_localization.context: - Keep `litellm` updated to the latest version for security fixes

needs_localization.content: - We've updated `ws` to `>=8.17.1` to fix DoS vulnerability
needs_localization.context: - We've updated `ws` to `>=8.17.1` to fix DoS vulnerability

needs_localization.content: - Subscribe to security advisories for nanobot and its dependencies
needs_localization.context: - Subscribe to security advisories for nanobot and its dependencies

needs_localization.content: - Configure rate limits on your API providers
needs_localization.context: - Configure rate limits on your API providers

needs_localization.content: - Set spending limits on LLM APIs
needs_localization.context: - Set spending limits on LLM APIs

needs_localization.content: - Use dedicated API keys with spending limits
needs_localization.context: - Use dedicated API keys with spending limits

needs_localization.content: - **Logs may contain sensitive information** - secure log files appropriately
needs_localization.context: - **Logs may contain sensitive information** - secure log files appropriately

needs_localization.content: - **LLM providers see your prompts** - review their privacy policies
needs_localization.context: - **LLM providers see your prompts** - review their privacy policies

needs_localization.content: - **Chat history is stored locally** - protect the `~/.nanobot` directory
needs_localization.context: - **Chat history is stored locally** - protect the `~/.nanobot` directory

needs_localization.content: - **API keys are in plain text** - use OS keyring for production
needs_localization.context: - **API keys are in plain text** - use OS keyring for production

needs_localization.content: - Path traversal protection on file operations
needs_localization.context: - Path traversal protection on file operations

needs_localization.content: - Input length limits on HTTP requests
needs_localization.context: - Input length limits on HTTP requests

needs_localization.content: - Allow-list based access control — in `v0.1.4.post3` and earlier empty means allow all; in newer versions empty means deny all (`["*"]` to explicitly allow all)
needs_localization.context: - Allow-list based access control — in `v0.1.4.post3` and earlier empty means allow all; in newer versions empty means deny all (`["*"]` to explicitly allow all)

needs_localization.content: - HTTPS for all external API calls
needs_localization.context: - HTTPS for all external API calls

needs_localization.content: - WhatsApp bridge: localhost-only binding + optional token auth
needs_localization.context: - WhatsApp bridge: localhost-only binding + optional token auth

needs_localization.content: 1. **No Rate Limiting** - Users can send unlimited messages (add your own if needed)
needs_localization.context: 1. **No Rate Limiting** - Users can send unlimited messages (add your own if needed)

needs_localization.content: 2. **Plain Text Config** - API keys stored in plain text (use keyring for production)
needs_localization.context: 2. **Plain Text Config** - API keys stored in plain text (use keyring for production)

needs_localization.content: 3. **No Session Management** - No automatic session expiry
needs_localization.context: 3. **No Session Management** - No automatic session expiry

needs_localization.content: 4. **Limited Command Filtering** - Only blocks obvious dangerous patterns
needs_localization.context: 4. **Limited Command Filtering** - Only blocks obvious dangerous patterns

needs_localization.content: 5. **No Audit Trail** - Limited security event logging (enhance as needed)
needs_localization.context: 5. **No Audit Trail** - Limited security event logging (enhance as needed)

needs_localization.content: - [ ] API keys stored securely (not in code)
needs_localization.context: - [ ] API keys stored securely (not in code)

needs_localization.content: - [ ] Dependencies updated to latest secure versions
needs_localization.context: - [ ] Dependencies updated to latest secure versions

needs_localization.content: - [ ] Rate limits configured on API providers
needs_localization.context: - [ ] Rate limits configured on API providers

needs_localization.content: - [ ] Backup and disaster recovery plan in place
needs_localization.context: - [ ] Backup and disaster recovery plan in place

needs_localization.content: - No API key needed for search and install.
needs_localization.context: - No API key needed for search and install.

needs_localization.content: - Login (`npx --yes clawhub@latest login`) is only required for publishing.
needs_localization.context: - Login (`npx --yes clawhub@latest login`) is only required for publishing.

needs_localization.content: - `--workdir ~/.nanobot/workspace` is critical — without it, skills install to the current directory instead of the nanobot workspace.
needs_localization.context: - `--workdir ~/.nanobot/workspace` is critical — without it, skills install to the current directory instead of the nanobot workspace.

needs_localization.content: - After install, remind the user to start a new session to load the skill.
needs_localization.context: - After install, remind the user to start a new session to load the skill.

needs_localization.content: 1. Specialized workflows - Multi-step procedures for specific domains
needs_localization.context: 1. Specialized workflows - Multi-step procedures for specific domains

needs_localization.content: 2. Tool integrations - Instructions for working with specific file formats or APIs
needs_localization.context: 2. Tool integrations - Instructions for working with specific file formats or APIs

needs_localization.content: 3. Domain expertise - Company-specific knowledge, schemas, business logic
needs_localization.context: 3. Domain expertise - Company-specific knowledge, schemas, business logic

needs_localization.content: 4. Bundled resources - Scripts, references, and assets for complex and repetitive tasks
needs_localization.context: 4. Bundled resources - Scripts, references, and assets for complex and repetitive tasks

needs_localization.content: - **Frontmatter** (YAML): Contains `name` and `description` fields. These are the only fields that the agent reads to determine when the skill gets used, thus it is very important to be clear and comprehensive in describing what the skill is, and when it should be used.
needs_localization.context: - **Frontmatter** (YAML): Contains `name` and `description` fields. These are the only fields that the agent reads to determine when the skill gets used, thus it is very important to be clear and comprehensive in describing what the skill is, and when it should be used.

needs_localization.content: - **Body** (Markdown): Instructions and guidance for using the skill. Only loaded AFTER the skill triggers (if at all).
needs_localization.context: - **Body** (Markdown): Instructions and guidance for using the skill. Only loaded AFTER the skill triggers (if at all).

needs_localization.content: - **When to include**: When the same code is being rewritten repeatedly or deterministic reliability is needed
needs_localization.context: - **When to include**: When the same code is being rewritten repeatedly or deterministic reliability is needed

needs_localization.content: - **Benefits**: Token efficient, deterministic, may be executed without loading into context
needs_localization.context: - **Benefits**: Token efficient, deterministic, may be executed without loading into context

needs_localization.content: - **Note**: Scripts may still need to be read by the agent for patching or environment-specific adjustments
needs_localization.context: - **Note**: Scripts may still need to be read by the agent for patching or environment-specific adjustments

needs_localization.content: - **When to include**: For documentation that the agent should reference while working
needs_localization.context: - **When to include**: For documentation that the agent should reference while working

needs_localization.content: - **Examples**: `references/finance.md` for financial schemas, `references/mnda.md` for company NDA template, `references/policies.md` for company policies, `references/api_docs.md` for API specifications
needs_localization.context: - **Examples**: `references/finance.md` for financial schemas, `references/mnda.md` for company NDA template, `references/policies.md` for company policies, `references/api_docs.md` for API specifications

needs_localization.content: - **Use cases**: Database schemas, API documentation, domain knowledge, company policies, detailed workflow guides
needs_localization.context: - **Use cases**: Database schemas, API documentation, domain knowledge, company policies, detailed workflow guides

needs_localization.content: - **Benefits**: Keeps SKILL.md lean, loaded only when the agent determines it's needed
needs_localization.context: - **Benefits**: Keeps SKILL.md lean, loaded only when the agent determines it's needed

needs_localization.content: - **Best practice**: If files are large (>10k words), include grep search patterns in SKILL.md
needs_localization.context: - **Best practice**: If files are large (>10k words), include grep search patterns in SKILL.md

needs_localization.content: - **Avoid duplication**: Information should live in either SKILL.md or references files, not both. Prefer references files for detailed information unless it's truly core to the skill—this keeps SKILL.md lean while making information discoverable without hogging the context window. Keep only essential procedural instructions and workflow guidance in SKILL.md; move detailed reference material, schemas, and examples to references files.
needs_localization.context: - **Avoid duplication**: Information should live in either SKILL.md or references files, not both. Prefer references files for detailed information unless it's truly core to the skill—this keeps SKILL.md lean while making information discoverable without hogging the context window. Keep only essential procedural instructions and workflow guidance in SKILL.md; move detailed reference material, schemas, and examples to references files.
